title: stelis retroversa
intro: Stelis retroversa, a species of orchid, is a flowering plant known for its unique characteristics. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stelis retroversa include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
